items.html: At that time, the illumination of the root of Hochma was extended downward, and the male was incorporated in the Nukva. The Nukva receives first, since she equalizes in merit with the male, and both receive from the root of the upper Keter equally. Since they now receive from root of Hochma, the Nukva receives first from all three here, they receive from her and are incorporated in her, as in, “A virtuous woman is her husband’s crown.”
